title: Multiomic profiling of the tumor immune microenvironment following bronchoscopic thermal ablation in non-small cell lung cancer
author: Rangamuwa, Kanishka
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: All data supporting the findings of the publication "Multiomic profiling of the tumor immune microenvironment following bronchoscopic thermal ablation in non-small cell lung cancer", including, targeted bulk RNA sequencing data, TCR sequencing, CyTOF FCS files and MIBI data (phenotyped cells with the mean of intensities per marker).
steps_raw: All data supporting the findings of the publication "Multiomic profiling of the tumor immune microenvironment following bronchoscopic thermal ablation in non-small cell lung cancer", including, targeted bulk RNA sequencing data, TCR sequencing, CyTOF FCS files and MIBI data (phenotyped cells with the mean of intensities per marker).
